case_title: RICARDO MENJIVAR ET AL VS. UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-05-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2016 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MENJIVAR, RICARDO (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) MENJIVAR, CALEB IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL, INC. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MENJIVAR, RICARDO (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) MENJIVAR, CALEB AS TO DEFENDANT UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PETITION AND ORDER FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM FILED PER ORDER BY PLAINTIFF MENJIVAR, RICARDO (GUARDIAN AD LITEM)
ORDER ON EX PARTE APPLICATION - THE COURT ORDERS THAT: RICARDO MENJIVAR IS HEREBY APPOINTED AS THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR: CALEB MENJIVAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF RICARDO MENJIVAR (GUARDIAN AD LITEM). APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT UNION EXPRESS TRAVEL INC'S REPRESENTATIVES YUN FEI LIU (CEO) AND HAO QIU ZHEN (DRIVER). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
